creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The ports framework now has support for Github as a MASTER_SITE. By
using this it also avoids needing to change FETCH_ARGS, and allows for
downloads to work without SSL support. See my patch here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~bdrewery/patch-www-cakephp22-2.2.2.txt

You can read more about it in /usr/ports/CHANGES


-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
